data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of being weather-dependent with a cancellation policy. However, the evidence provided indicates that only 2 customers have booked the tour, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants to run the tour. This gap in participant numbers directly impacts the ability to assess the weather-dependent cancellation policy, as the tour cannot proceed without sufficient bookings, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: Only 2 customers have booked the tour, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
